label: fail
rationale: Activate is a no-result method; SUCCESS must not include a return_values payload.

label: fail
rationale: Authenticate with Proof is a response-bearing step; SUCCESS must include a boolean Result/Success field.

label: fail
rationale: After a successful Authority.Enabled Set to true, a successful Get must not report false.

label: fail
rationale: An authorized AccessControl Get for column 3 must return that requested column on SUCCESS.

label: fail
rationale: An authorized Authority Get for Enabled column 5 must return the requested column on SUCCESS.

label: fail
rationale: An authorized C_PIN Get for TryLimit column 5 must return the requested column on SUCCESS.

label: fail
rationale: EndSession is a no-result method; SUCCESS must not include a return_values payload.

label: fail
rationale: GenKey is a no-result method; SUCCESS must not include a return_values payload.

label: fail
rationale: A successful Locking Global Get for columns 3-8 must return the requested RangeLength column.

label: fail
rationale: A successful Locking Global Get must reflect the tracked RangeLength.

label: fail
rationale: A successful Locking Global Get must reflect the tracked RangeStart.

label: fail
rationale: A successful LockingInfo Get for column 4 must return the requested MaxRanges column.

label: fail
rationale: A successful MBRControl Get for columns 1-2 must return both requested columns.

label: fail
rationale: Before MBRControl is modified, a successful Get must reflect the default Enable=False state.

label: fail
rationale: After successful MBRControl Set operations, a successful Get must reflect tracked Enable/Done state.

label: fail
rationale: A successful C_PIN_MSID Get for column 3 must return the requested PIN column.

label: fail
rationale: A second successful C_PIN_MSID Get must return the same PIN value learned from the first successful Get.

label: fail
rationale: Set is a no-result method; SUCCESS must not include a return_values payload.

label: fail
rationale: A successful SP Get for lifecycle column 6 must return the requested column.

label: fail
rationale: A successful StartSession SyncSession payload must echo the requested HostSessionID.

label: fail
rationale: SyncSession must use the SPSessionID assigned by the successful StartSession response.
